summary: Complete testing of Dashboard page with all 12 CaseDetail features. All features verified working: Download Brief, Share, Score History Graph, Horizontal Battle Preview, James Question Card with clickable answer buttons, Recent Jurisprudence, Outcome Predictor, Risk Monitor (Gmail/Outlook), Next Actions with Generate letter/Book a call links, Letter Generation Modal, Share Modal, New Case Overlay with 8 situation cards.

1_login_redirect_to_dashboard.evidence: Login with test@jasper.legal / JasperPro2026! redirects to /dashboard with most recent case auto-selected

2_download_brief_button.evidence: Download Brief button visible in top bar, clicking generates PDF via jsPDF client-side. Downloaded: 'PropertyFirst Eviction with Security Deposit Counterclaim.pdf'

3_share_button_and_modal.evidence: Share button visible in top bar, clicking opens Share Modal with generated link and 'Copy link' button. Link expires in 7 days.

4_risk_score_section.evidence: Risk Score section renders with main score (75) and 4 dimension scores (Financial: 85, Urgency: 95, Legal: 45, Complexity: 75)

5_james_analysis_section.evidence: James Analysis section shows findings with legal references (Florida Statute citations)

6_james_question_card.evidence: James Question Card visible with interactive answer buttons (Yes, it is in my lease / No, I never agreed to this / I am not sure). Clicking answer submits to /api/cases/{case_id}/james-answer endpoint.

7_score_history_graph.evidence: Score History section visible with SVG graph showing score progression

8_horizontal_battle_preview.evidence: Battle Preview renders horizontally with 'Your arguments' (green) and 'Their arguments' (red) columns

9_recent_jurisprudence.evidence: Recent legal updates section visible with case law entries from CourtListener API

10_outcome_predictor.evidence: Outcome Predictor section visible with percentage bars for favorable/settlement/partial/full loss outcomes

11_risk_monitor.evidence: Risk Monitor section at bottom with 'Never miss a legal document' text and 'Connect Gmail' / 'Connect Outlook' buttons

12_next_actions_panel.evidence: Right panel shows Next Actions with 'Generate letter →' and 'Book a call →' links. Clicking 'Generate letter' opens Letter Modal.

13_letter_generation_modal.evidence: Letter Modal opens when clicking action item, shows 'Generating...' state, then displays generated letter content via /api/cases/{case_id}/generate-action-letter endpoint

14_new_case_overlay.evidence: Clicking 'Open a new case' button opens overlay with 8 situation cards in EN (landlord, threatening letter, employer, insurance, contract, court summons, debt collector, other)

15_james_sidebar_stats.evidence: James sidebar card shows stats: 847K+ live sources, 20 yrs experience, Live case law, #1 Legal AI

backend_tests.test_get_cases_list: PASS - Returns 28 cases with all required fields
backend_tests.test_case_has_battle_preview: PASS - Cases include battle_preview with user_side and opposing_side
backend_tests.test_case_has_success_probability: PASS - Cases include success_probability for Outcome Predictor
backend_tests.test_case_has_recent_case_law: PASS - Cases include recent_case_law from CourtListener
backend_tests.test_case_has_james_question: PASS - Cases include james_question with text and options
backend_tests.test_case_has_risk_score_history: PASS - Cases include risk_score_history for Score History graph
backend_tests.test_share_case_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/cases/{case_id}/share returns share token and ID
backend_tests.test_james_answer_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/cases/{case_id}/james-answer processes answer and returns impact

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 CaseDetail features successfully ported to Dashboard page
Dashboard.js is 881 lines - well-organized with clear sections for each feature
Letter generation uses Claude AI via /api/cases/{case_id}/generate-action-letter endpoint
Share functionality creates secure links with 7-day expiry via /api/cases/{case_id}/share endpoint
James Q&A is interactive - clicking answer buttons calls /api/cases/{case_id}/james-answer and updates case analysis
PDF Brief generation uses jsPDF client-side library
New Case Overlay has 8 situation cards with EN/FR/NL translations
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data with 28 cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard page now has all 12 CaseDetail features: Download Brief, Share, Score History, Battle Preview (horizontal), James Q&A (interactive), Jurisprudence, Outcome Predictor, Risk Monitor, Next Actions with Generate letter/Book a call, Letter Modal, Share Modal, New Case Overlay. All features tested and working. The test user test@jasper.legal has 28 cases with full analysis data.
